backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining user profile management (sport, skill level, location permission) and helicopter booking via Google Calendar HTTP outcalls, with CRUD operations gated against anonymous callers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—ActivateSportScreen sport activation/navigation and SportContext/SportProvider setup—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes (backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, sidebar).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Sport Buddies SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration declaring all application routes across two layouts (full nav and header-only), wrapped in `SportProvider` and `QueryClientProvider` for global context and data fetching.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Map, Events, Coins, Profile) using maroon background and gold active state, with exact-match detection for the Home tab.
frontend/src/components/DebugBanner.tsx: Debug overlay component displaying the current route, authentication status, and profile completion state as badge pills.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with the error message and a 'Go Home' button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top header showing the Sport Buddies logo/wordmark, a coin balance pill, a QR/UPC scan button, and an emergency shield button, each navigating to their respective routes.
Simple full-screen loading spinner component displayed while lazy-loaded routes or async data are pending.
frontend/src/components/LocationPermissi: A modal dialog component that prompts the user to enable location access, with Cancel and Enable Location buttons and an optional requesting state.
frontend/src/components/PresenceBanner.t: A fixed top banner displaying a live sport presence status with an animated ping indicator that stops flashing after a specified timestamp.
frontend/src/components/ScreenBanner.tsx: A simple debug banner component that displays the current screen name and route name in a styled yellow bar.
frontend/src/context/SportContext.tsx: React context providing sport activation state (active/inactive, current sport, user mode, location toggle) with actions to activate, deactivate, and configure sport presence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivationStatus.t: A hook that manages a timed 10-second 'OUT_NOW' activation status persisted in localStorage, with countdown tracking and auto-expiry.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: A hook that tracks attended event IDs in localStorage, awards 5 coins on first attendance, and synchronizes state across tabs via custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinBalance.ts: A hook that manages a persistent coin balance in localStorage and synchronizes updates across components using a custom browser event.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoinScanner.ts: A hook that wraps QR scanning to validate scanned codes against a predefined list, awards coins for valid unclaimed codes, and tracks claimed codes in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useEventJoinState.ts: A hook that persists joined event IDs and participant count overrides in localStorage, providing join/leave actions with cross-tab synchronization.
frontend/src/hooks/useHelicopterAvailabi: A React Query hook that fetches helicopter calendar availability from the backend actor for a given time range, parsing the JSON response into busy blocks.
React Query mutation hook that submits helicopter booking requests to the backend actor and invalidates availability cache on success, with JSON response parsing and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocationPermission: Hook that checks and requests browser geolocation permissions using the Permissions API with a fallback to getCurrentPosition, tracking permission state and a loading flag.
frontend/src/hooks/usePresenceState.ts: Hook that manages a user's 'OUT_NOW' presence status in localStorage, handling activation with a 10-minute expiry, a 10-second flash period, and periodic expiry checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend health, completing a user profile, checking profile completion status, and fetching the current user's profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRedemptions.ts: Hook that manages reward redemption records in localStorage, supporting adding new redemptions with generated codes and retrieving them by ID, with cross-tab sync via storage events.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining the Sport Buddies maroon/gold/black brand theme via CSS custom properties, base styles, and utility classes for buttons, inputs, and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ActivateSportScreen.t: Screen that lets users select a sport and activate their live presence on the map, with location permission handling and one-touch activation flow.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page that handles Internet Identity login/signup and redirects users to profile setup or home based on profile completion status.
frontend/src/pages/CoinGrabPage.tsx: QR code scanning page that awards coins to users for scanning valid, unclaimed QR codes, storing claimed codes in localStorage to prevent reuse.
frontend/src/pages/CoinsPage.tsx: Coins dashboard showing the user's coin balance with action cards for earning coins via helicopter reservations, UPC/QR scanning, and friend invites.
frontend/src/pages/CreateEventPage.tsx: Placeholder page for creating sport events, displaying a prefilled sport from URL params and a stub message indicating the feature is coming soon.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyPage.tsx: Minimal placeholder page that renders an Emergency heading with no functionality implemented.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyShieldPage.t: Emergency SOS page with a hold-to-activate button that triggers an emergency shield, logging actions like notifying buddies, contacting emergency contacts, or calling 911.
frontend/src/pages/EventDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information for a single event (found by ID from mock data), including date, location, participants, and join/leave/host actions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Lists all mock sports events with sport-based filtering, showing participant counts and join state, with navigation to individual event detail pages and event creation.
frontend/src/pages/HelicopterPage.tsx: Form page for booking a helicopter ride, supporting availability checking, passenger/weight input, and payment via cash or coins (costing 2000 coins).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page with primary CTA to activate a sport and secondary navigation buttons for Map, Helicopter, Marketplace, and SOS/Emergency Shield features.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Informational page explaining the coin-earning system through step-by-step cards and a coin value reference table for various actions like scanning QR codes and attending events.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Invite friends page that displays a shareable referral link with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, explaining the coin reward for successful referrals.
frontend/src/pages/MapPage.tsx: Displays a 'Nearby Buddies' map page with sport filter chips, a mock list of nearby users, and a 'Go Live' button that updates the user's presence status in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Renders a marketplace page with two tabs: a gear listing market (with mock items and contact-seller actions) and a pro shops directory, using toast notifications for interactions.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 page that displays a 'Route Not Found' message and a button to navigate back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/PresenceDetailPage.ts: Shows a detail view for a specific nearby buddy (looked up by ID from mock data), displaying their sport, status, distance, and action buttons to invite to an event or scan a QR code.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that displays identity/profile data, allows selecting a presence status, toggling location permission via a modal, and provides logout and emergency shield navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Onboarding form page that collects a user's name, primary sport, skill level, and location permission preference, then submits via the completeProfile mutation and navigates home.
Displays the details of a single redemption by ID, including item name, cost, status, redemption code with copy functionality, and claim instructions. Shows a not-found state if the redemption doesn't exist.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPage.tsx: Safety hub page with two feature cards for Emergency Shield setup and Emergency Notifications, each offering setup navigation or an informational toast via Learn buttons.
frontend/src/pages/ScannerPage.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/ScannerStubPage.tsx: Placeholder scanner page shown in preview environments where camera access is unavailable, displaying a descriptive message and camera placeholder based on the 'type' query param (upc or qr).
frontend/src/pages/ScanPage.tsx: Scan landing page with two options—Scan UPC/CoinGrab and Scan QR Badge—that navigate to the coin-grab route if camera is available, or show a fallback toast in preview environments.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Minimal page that reads a sessionId URL param and renders it as plain text, serving as a stub for session detail views.
frontend/src/pages/SOSLogPage.tsx: Shows a list of past SOS emergency events loaded from localStorage, displaying start/end times, duration, and actions taken. Includes a confirmation dialog to clear all logs.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Coin-based store page listing redeemable items filterable by category, with a confirmation flow that deducts coins and navigates to the redemption detail page upon purchase.
frontend/src/services/calendarIntegratio: Stub service for Google Calendar integration providing mock implementations of `getCalendarFreeBusy` and `createBookingEvent` that simulate API delays and return placeholder values for MVP use.
frontend/src/utils/safeNavigate.ts: Utility that validates a target route path against a whitelist of known valid prefixes before navigating, showing a 'Coming soon' toast for unrecognized routes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic colors, brand colors (maroon, gold, charcoal), border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for the Sport Buddies app describing architecture, existing features, known issues, and pending feature requests related to SportContext and screen navigation.
